Jane Doe
jane.doe@email.com | +91-9876543210 | linkedin.com/in/janedoe | github.com/janedoe

Summary
Results-driven software engineer with 3 years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean code and developer tooling.

Skills
Python, FastAPI, Django, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS, Git

Work Experience
Software Engineer, Acme Corp, Jan 2022 - Present
Led migration of monolith to microservices, reducing deployment time by 40%. Built internal CI/CD tooling used by 5 engineering teams.
Junior Developer, Beta Solutions, Jun 2020 - Dec 2021
Developed REST APIs for the customer portal and fixed over 50 production bugs.

Education
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science, ABC University, 2016-2020, CGPA 8.4

Projects
RAG Chatbot - Built with LangChain, ChromaDB, and Mistral, deployed on Render with Docker. Indexes internal docs and answers employee questions.
Expense Tracker - Full-stack app using Next.js and PostgreSQL with JWT auth.

Certifications
AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate, issued 2023
MongoDB Certified Developer, issued 2022

Awards
Winner, Smart India Hackathon 2019, ranked 1st among 500 teams

Languages
English: Native, Hindi: Fluent, Spanish: Intermediate

Volunteer Experience
Volunteered at local NGO organizing community coding workshops for underprivileged students.
